mood.name: queasy
mood.reason: deleted messiah image and blockaded ships under flat sky

reaction: The overcast felt right for once. I read about Trump posting himself as Jesus and deleting it and I couldn't tell if I wanted to laugh or throw up—just this slick little image of divinity, gone by breakfast. The tankers turning back in the strait, the percentile of hunger, the pope being scolded like a kid. All of it under this low gray lid.
